span.p:
List payments
List locations
List team members

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Merchant Initiates
Clicks Connect with Square

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
/oauth/authorize
Generate CSRF state token
Build authorization URL

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Square OAuth Consent Screen
Merchant reviews scopes:
PAYMENTS_READ, ORDERS_READ
EMPLOYEES_READ, TIMECARDS_READ
ITEMS_READ, INVENTORY_READ
GIFTCARDS_READ, CUSTOMERS_READ
CASH_DRAWER_READ, MERCHANT_PROFILE_READ

span.p:
POST /oauth2/token
client_id, client_secret
code, grant_type, redirect_uri

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Extract from response
merchant_id (Square)
access_token, refresh_token
expires_in, scope

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
_provision_merchant()
Create/find merchants row
Returns internal UUID

Pull payments, locations,
team_members via Square API
